name: Sweet 'n' Spicy Onion Glaze
recipeIngredient: 20 oz (1 Jar) Env. Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the jar of Env. Onion Soup Mix and measure out 20 ounces.
2. Choose one of the salad dressings: Russian or Sweet 'n Spicy French, measuring out 8 ounces.
3. Combine the onion soup mix and chosen dressing in a bowl.
4. Stir until well mixed.
5. Turn off heat (if applicable).
